Counter-terror police join Derby car incident investigationPolice question a man, 36, and keep an "open mind" as counter‑terror officers join investigation. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn78v1yg7p1o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn78v1yg7p1o#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 16:40:57 GMT
Jeremy Bowen: Trump is waging war based on instinct and it isn't workingOne month into the conflict in Iran, Trump's gut-instinct approach is not proving effective, writes the BBC's international editor. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5y969pnxgvo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5y969pnxgvo#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 00:02:46 GMT
Tudor leaves Spurs after just 44 days in chargeIgor Tudor leaves Tottenham Hotspur with immediate effect. https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/cz0g57p8512o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/cz0g57p8512o#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 14:39:04 GMT
Cut taxes on energy bills before giving bailouts, Badenoch saysThe Tory leader refuses to rule out direct payments to households if bills spike but says this would come at a cost. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1d941vw172o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1d941vw172o#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 11:12:33 GMT
Israeli police block Latin Patriarch from Palm Sunday mass in JerusalemThe move drew criticism from the church, global leaders and the US ambassador. Israel's PM said it was a safety measure following recent Iranian strikes. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg0128z41eo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg0128z41eo#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 17:09:00 GMT

Murder inquiry victim found in Leeds street identified as 16-year-old girlThe teenager found unconscious in Leeds was a teenager from Cleckheaton, police say. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c145j60236vo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c145j60236vo#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 13:03:13 GMT
Two hit albums then Freya Ridings was dropped by her label. But an act of defiance changed everythingThe singer defied her team and fled to LA to record a new album. It was the best move she's ever made. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crr1wevpglqo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crr1wevpglqo#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 00:44:50 GMT

Man, 26, shot dead in car near London Euston stationPolice say CCTV showed he was shot at several times by a suspect who arrived and left on a bike. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwykgv0xlwwo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwykgv0xlwwo#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 15:51:22 GMT
Iran says its forces 'waiting' as US troops arrive in regionUS officials have not confirmed if ground troops will be deployed in the conflict, which would escalate the war. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cge01w2dxe0o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cge01w2dxe0o#1 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 16:07:29 GMT
